task_description: Fix multiple bugs: app crash without permissions at sign-up, Slides connect/disconnect false positive, offline task drag duplication, and missing sign out button in settings.

verification.summary: pnpm lint passes with no errors. pnpm test: 2 pre-existing test failures (ChatExperience and Sidebar tests were already failing before our changes due to outdated test assertions for components modified in prior work). Our changes introduced no new test failures. The 2 passing test suites (ParticleSystem, QuickCapture) continue to pass.
